title: Koeleria valdevestita
intro: Koeleria valdevestita, commonly known as Koeler's hair-grass, is a perennial grass species belonging to the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may aid in reducing symptoms of respiratory issues and improving overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of Koeleria valdevestita include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. Herbal preparations made from Koeleria valdevestita, such as infusions and decoctions, are commonly used in traditional medicine to address various health concerns.
